title: spiraea × difformis
intro: Spiraea × difformis, also known as Roseroot, is a hybrid plant species in the rose family (Rosaceae) that is native to Europe and Asia. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its adaptogenic and anti-inflammatory effects, which are attributed to its content of phenolic compounds and iridoids. The health benefits of Spiraea × difformis include its ability to enhance mental clarity, reduce stress and anxiety, and improve overall well-being. The plant is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and capsules, which can be consumed to support adrenal function and promote a sense of balance and calmness.
